flashcards.question: Radiation
flashcards.answer: Heat transfer through electromagnetic waves; no medium required (travels through space)

flashcards.question: Conduction
flashcards.answer: Heat transfer through direct molecular contact; warm surface heats air molecules touching it

flashcards.question: Convection
flashcards.answer: Heat transfer by the movement of heated fluids; warm air rises, cool air sinks, creating circulation cells

flashcards.question: Albedo
flashcards.answer: The fraction of solar energy reflected by a surface; ice and clouds have high albedo

flashcards.question: Greenhouse Effect
flashcards.answer: Atmospheric gases trap re-radiated infrared energy, warming Earth's surface
